name: GOLFTEC Tempe
address: 2010 E Rio Salado Pkwy Suite 118, Tempe, AZ 85288
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and practice facility that offers data-driven coaching and high-tech training environments. They utilize advanced tools like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise feedback on swing mechanics and ball flight. The focus is on personalized improvement through structured lessons, practice memberships, and custom club fittings, making it suitable for golfers seeking a systematic approach to skill development. While the Tempe-specific page is unavailable, the brand emphasizes its network of certified PGA coaches and locations across the U.S. and internationally, with a reputation for delivering measurable results for players of all levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors provides detailed swing and ball data
Personalized coaching with data-driven game plans tailored to individual goals
Structured practice memberships with access to training bays and video feedback
Custom club fitting using launch monitors and shaft optimization to improve distance

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor brand mentioned for club fitting and lessons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and practice sessions, though you can bring your own clubs if preferred. Club fitting services are also available to help you find the perfect equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks to the facility?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food service or beverage options at GOLFTEC. It is recommended to confirm their policy on outside food and drinks directly with the location.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC primarily focuses on instruction and practice rather than full golf rounds. Simulator-based practice sessions and lessons are typically shorter, depending on the specific program or package chosen.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers programs and technology suitable for juniors and youth golfers, though specific details about kid-friendly amenities or events are not provided. Contact the location directly for information on junior programs.
